episodes.title: Connect Connect S2E7: Favour on Surviving Your 20s In a Dog-Eat-Dog World!
episodes.description: Meet Favour, a lawyer, content marketer, and podcast host who, at some point in uni, mentally clocked out of the career she thought she wanted.

episodes.title: Content Connect S2E4: What 7 Years in Content Taught Abioye About Growth, Money & Execution
episodes.description: Meet Abioye Ogundairo, a content writer, marketer, and founder of TechWriteable, a platform helping writers build portfolios, find jobs, and collaborate with companies across the world.

episodes.title: Content Connect S2E2: How Fashion, Twitter & “Luck” Launched Gift Into Tech!
episodes.description: Meet Gift Arku – a marketing associate, a fashion lover, and your favorite outspoken Twitter girlie 👩🏽💻👠.

episodes.title: Content Connect S2E6: The Gen Z Screenwriter Who Makes You Feel Seen (not just entertained)
episodes.description: Meet Nengi Diri (the Nengi you heard about), an experienced screenwriter, content writer, and UX writer who was actually behind one of the biggest Nollywood movies last year.

episodes.title: Content Connect S1E6: Ife’s Got SEO Game AND Loverboy Energy!
episodes.description: Ifeoluwa Adekoya, an amazing content marketer and SEO strategist at the core. Learn about his journey in the marketing industry and his appreciation for continuous growth and improvement.

episodes.title: Content Connect S2E3: How Mariam Turned Her Love for Media Into a Dream Job
episodes.description: Meet Mariam Akinbami, social media strategist, community manager, and all-round creative powerhouse at Zikoko, one of Africa’s biggest media brands.
